title: Roasted Silky Ethiopian Tofu Ye Beg Alichia
description: A kid-friendly Ethiopian dish made with roasted tofu and a blend of spices, featuring soy sauce and deep-fry-tod, suitable for shojin-friendly diets.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, vegetable oil, onion, garlic, ginger, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the tofu cubes in a single layer.
Roast the tofu in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, flipping the cubes halfway through.
Remove the tofu from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the roasted tofu hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
